stars.description: DeepSeek 4 Flash local inference engine for Metal
stars.highlights: A local inference engine for DeepSeek 4 Flash optimized for Apple Metal, enabling fast LLM inference on Mac hardware. Written in C for performance, it provides a lightweight alternative to cloud-based inference.
stars.worthReading: Essential for AI developers using Apple Silicon who want to run DeepSeek models locally with minimal overhead and high speed.
stars.scoreReason: Freshness is moderate (2, new repo with 2.6k stars, rising), relevance is high (4, frontier LLM inference), concreteness is high (2, working engine).
